[PDF_PAGE 106 | score=2] SUol.ge Weol.pons The lump term "savage s" is being used here to refer to any number of different types of people. They have In common these traits: The y're not as technologica lly advanc ed as the normal peoples of Lhe campaJgn. thou gh some do mak e weapons of bronze or Iron: and they 're probab ly hunt er·gatherers who have not yet em bra ced Lhe agricultural revolution. And thal's really all they have to have In common . "Savag es" might be highly cuI· tur ed, artisti c. peaceful peoples. but if they have dirt floors or flint·tipped weapons. the rest of the world calls them savage . For our purposes. " savages" en­ compasses Neand erthal man. Old Stone Age era-magnan, and New Stone Age
